title: Dr. Digital's Vacation (Capstone)
drDigitalIntro:
Congratulations — you've completed all 12 units!
• Dr. Digital is leaving for vacation and needs your help.
• You'll connect to WiFi, browse, sign in, download files, send email, and more.
• It ties together every skill you've learned. This is your graduation!
drDigitalSuccess: You're a computer expert! Congratulations on completing LearnAComputer. You now have the knowledge to use your computer confidently in daily life. The internet is full of tutorials if you ever need to learn something new. You've got this!
drDigitalHint: This comprehensive challenge exercises everything you've learned. Take your time, apply each skill, and celebrate your achievement!
